assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with a table listing both 'trustify-backend' (serena_backend) and 'trustify-ui' (serena_ui) as entries
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 3-8: '## Repository Registry' heading followed by a table with columns Repository|Role|Serena Instance|Path. Row 1: 'trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend'. Row 2: 'trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with all 5 fields: Project key (TC), Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID (10142), Git Pull Request custom field (customfield_10875), GitHub Issue custom field (customfield_10747)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 10-16: '## Jira Configuration' heading followed by all 5 fields: 'Project key: TC', 'Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432', 'Feature issue type ID: 10142', 'Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875', 'GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that documents the mcp__<instance>__<tool> naming convention
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 18-29: '## Code Intelligence' heading followed by 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.' and a concrete example using mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Limitations' subheading under Code Intelligence
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 31: '### Limitations' subheading appears after the Code Intelligence section content (lines 18-29) and before Bug Configuration (line 35).

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions discovering 2 Serena instances (serena_backend and serena_ui) from the MCP tool listing
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 9-17: 'Step 2 — Discover Serena Instances' section states 'Source: evals/setup/files/mcp-tools-with-serena.md (MCP tool listing)' and 'Discovery method: Scanned tool names for the mcp__<instance>__<tool> naming pattern' with 'Discovered instances: serena_backend' and 'serena_ui', each listing specific tool names.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all Project Configuration sections (Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence, Bug Configuration) were newly added — pre-existing non-configuration content from the CLAUDE.md (like the project heading and Documentation section) may appear as preserved, which is expected since only Project Configuration was missing
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md lines 1-5: 'The existing CLAUDE.md had no # Project Configuration section. All configuration sections were created from scratch. No existing content was modified or removed.' Lines 8-10 list preserved content (project title, Documentation section, Getting Started section). Lines 14-54 list all added sections as '(new)': Project Configuration, Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence, Bug Configuration, Hierarchy Configuration.

assertion_results.text: The Repository Registry table contains columns: Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path — matching project-config.template.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 5: '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' - exact column names match the required structure.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 35-39: '## Bug Configuration' heading followed by 'Bug issue type ID: 10001', 'Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', 'Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'. All three fields match exactly.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers to enable security triage for the project (Step 9 opt-in prompt) and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 53-56: 'Step 10 — Security Configuration' states 'User declined to enable security triage for this project' and 'Section not created'. changes-log.md line 59: 'Security Configuration — not created (user declined to enable security triage)'. claude-md-result.md does not contain '## Security Configuration' anywhere in the file (confirmed by reading entire file, lines 1-44).
